tests.name: runTaskLoop stops on invalid response limit
runTaskLoop repairs malformed planner payloads before executing tool calls
runTaskLoop replays unrecoverable invalid planner payloads through invalid_tool_call
runTaskLoop cuts off runaway streamed tool JSON and reprompts once
runTaskLoop truncates oversized rg output to the largest fitting prefix
runTaskLoop advances overlapping repo_read_file calls to the next unread span
runTaskLoop replays effective repo_read_file range after native unread expansion
runTaskLoop replays only returned repo_read_file range after fitting oversized read
runTaskLoop bounds repo_read_file unread span at the next returned range
runTaskLoop reports when repo_read_file has no unread lines left
runTaskLoop truncates oversized repo_list_files output with omitted file count
runTaskLoop preserves raw line-read stats when oversized Get-Content output is replaced
runTaskLoop does not print a red console warning when successful output is fitted
preflightPlannerPromptBudget reports overflow against context budget
preflightPlannerPromptBudget reserves provider prompt overhead against context budget
compactPlannerMessagesOnce preserves system and latest user intent
compactPlannerMessagesOnce budgets provider prompt overhead while selecting history
runTaskLoop fails with planner_preflight_overflow before provider request when compaction cannot fit
runTaskLoop includes planner provider reserve in dynamic output budget
runTaskLoop applies one-pass compaction and continues when compacted prompt fits
runTaskLoop increases per-tool cap as tool-call progress grows
runTaskLoop fits tool output that exceeds remaining token allowance
runTaskLoop subtracts accepted same-turn tool results from remaining allowance
runTaskLoop accepts first finish immediately when runtime reasoning is off
runTaskLoop accepts first finish immediately when runtime reasoning is on
runTaskLoop does not emit follow-up finish events after many reasoning-off tool calls
runTaskLoop keeps reasoning disabled across max-turn exhaustion when runtime reasoning is off
runTaskLoop retries transient provider network failures via shared retry helper
runTaskLoop waits for planner endpoint warm-up when initial connections are refused
runTaskLoop retries planner calls when endpoint returns HTTP 503 Loading model
runTaskLoop blocks exact duplicate commands with explicit error message
runTaskLoop blocks semantic duplicate repo-search commands with explicit error message
runTaskLoop keeps raw rewrite notes in logs but inserts compact repo-search results into the prompt
runTaskLoop keeps routine normalized repo_rg flags out of model replay while audit keeps effective command
runTaskLoop widens repeated Get-Content reads on the same file and logs requested vs adjusted window
runTaskLoop records adjusted Get-Content coverage from fitted returned lines only
runTaskLoop clamps adjusted repeated Get-Content skip to non-negative values
runTaskLoop forces repeated backward same-file reads to non-overlapping forward windows
runTaskLoop tracks per-file overlap telemetry and isolates histories across files
runTaskLoop does not compact different commands that happen to return the same evidence
runTaskLoop forces finish mode after ten zero-output commands
runTaskLoop enables thinking on every tool-call turn when runtime reasoning is on
runTaskLoop disables thinking on every tool-call turn when runtime reasoning is off
buildScorecard aggregates totals and verdict
mock planner strips think block from response text
runTaskLoop records real planner turn per command and per-turn thinking
runTaskLoop keeps only latest planner thinking when per-step thinking is disabled
runTaskLoop sets turn on a duplicate-rejected command push
runTaskLoop records turn thinking for an invalid-parse turn
